Ira & Larry Goldberg Coins & Collectibles - Auction 150, Lot 426 — Britain, Iceni. Ca. 20 BC- AD 40. Silver Unit (1.20g) 14 mm. Norfolk God type. Male head facing r. Reverse: Pelta over horse. NGC Choice XF; Strike: 5/5, Surface: 3/5 scratches.  Boldly struck on both
sales.description:
Britain, Iceni. Ca. 20 BC- AD 40. Silver Unit (1.20g) 14 mm. Norfolk God type. Male head facing r. Reverse: Pelta over horse. NGC Choice XF; Strike: 5/5, Surface: 3/5 scratches.  Boldly struck on both sides with lovely iridescent toning.  Estimated Value $250 - UP
Ex The Peter Preovolos Collection....
